note: Capstone of the training-free research arc (031-035). Principle (user-stated, confirmed): binarization is the QPS floor; research value must STACK on it, not compete. Consolidated operating points (numbers from the same-session entries cited). Two tiers: (A) the binary funnel = throughput king, where rotation (026-029) and ADSampling rerank (034) stack as value-adds; (B) exact accelerators (PDX 032, PDX+ADSampling 033) = a separate HIGH-RECALL region, 4x naive exact but ~20x below binary.
